financialFreedom.title: Financial Freedom Calculator
financialFreedom.description: Plan your path to financial independence. Calculate when your savings can sustain your lifestyle.

calculator.title: Financial Freedom Calculator
calculator.dataLoadError: Could not load your financial data. You can still enter values manually.

currentSavings.label: Current Savings
currentSavings.description: Your total current savings and investments

monthlyExpenses.label: Monthly Expenses
monthlyExpenses.description: Your expected monthly expenses in retirement

withdrawalRate.label: Withdrawal Rate (%)
withdrawalRate.description: 4% rule: Safe withdrawal rate (adjust based on risk tolerance).

inflationRate.label: Inflation Rate (%)
inflationRate.learnMore: Learn about real vs nominal returns

compoundInterest.title: Compound Interest Calculator
compoundInterest.description: Visualize the power of compounding. Calculate how your investments grow over time with regular contributions.

frequency.label: Compounding Frequency
frequency.description: How often interest is compounded per year

years.label: Duration (years)
years.description: How long you plan to invest

contribution.label: Regular Contribution
contribution.description: Amount added at each compounding period

fields.contributionTimingDescription: Enabling this compounds your contribution for one extra period (annuity-due)

loanCalculator.title: Loan Calculator
loanCalculator.description: Calculate your monthly payments, total interest, and view the amortization schedule for your loan.

earlyPayoff.title: Early Mortgage Payoff Calculator
earlyPayoff.description: Calculate the impact of one-off lump-sum prepayments on your mortgage. Compare reducing your loan term versus lowering your monthly payment.

fields.paymentMonthDescription: Month from now when the payment is made (e.g. 12 = one year from now)
fields.monthlyExtraPaymentDescription: Fixed additional amount paid every month on top of the scheduled payment

earlyPayoff.noPayments: Add at least one lump-sum payment and click Calculate to see results.

iraInfo.title: French Early Repayment Penalty (IRA)
iraInfo.body: Under French law (Code de la consommation, art. L313-47), early repayment penalties are capped at the lower of: 6 months' interest on the reimbursed amount, or 3 % of the outstanding capital before repayment.
iraInfo.waiver: IRA may be waived in certain situations (job loss, forced relocation for a new job, sale of primary residence, etc.).
iraInfo.threshold: Some lenders require a minimum prepayment of 10 % of the initial loan amount.
